product_information.product_name: Earth Line ACEQ10 Creme Anti-age 50 ML
product_information.description: Deze multivitamine Q10 crème beschermt de huid optimaal tegen veroudering en gaat rimpelvorming tegen. Het bevordert de celvernieuwing en aanmaak van collageen. De huid wordt intensief gevoed en gehydrateerd.

inferred_information.raw_ingredients: Aqua (Water), Cetearyl Alcohol, Glycerin, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil**, Macadamia Integrifolia Seed Oil**, Glyceryl Stearate, Simmondsia Chinensis Seed Oil**, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter**, Alcohol, Sodium Cetearyl Sulfate, Prunus Amygdalus Dulcis Oil**, Cocos Nucifera Oil**, Limnanthes Alba Seed Oil, Parfum (Fragrance), Betaine, Levulinic Acid, P-Anisic Acid, Titanium Dioxide, Sodium Levulinate, Ascorbyl Palmitate, Symphytum Officinale Root Extract**, Tocopherol, Porphyra Umbilicalis Extract, Calendula Officinalis Flower Extract**, Chamomilla Recutita Flower Extract**, Equisetum Arvense Leaf Extract**, Phytic Acid, Rosa Canina Flower Extract**, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice Powder**, Disodium Cocoyl Glutamate, Sodium Cocoyl Glutamate, Salix Alba Bark Extract**, Aluminum Hydroxide, Ubiquinone, Sodium Benzoate, Lactic Acid, Sodium Lactate, Lavandula Hybrida Grosso Herb Oil, Daucus Carota Sativa Root Extract**, Rosmarinus Officinalis Leaf Extract**,Benzyl Benzoate*, Citral*, Citronellol*, Geraniol*, Limonene*, Linalool*.*from natural essential oils **from controlled organic agriculture
